spec.name: execute_node
spec.description: Execute Node.js code and return stdout/stderr
spec.implementation_notes: Run: node -e <code> . Node.js has built-in zlib module. Use process.stdout.write for output.

request.rationale: Need to perform zlib compression on file bytes. Python is not available (exit 9009), but Node.js is commonly installed on Windows and has a built-in zlib module. This is the missing capability to complete the objective.
